overview: A 3D flight simulator where players pick a flight plan, take off, fly to a guided destination, land, and get scored on speed and landing smoothness.
features: Main menu with Flight Logs, Flight Plans, and Flight School navigation
Flight Plans level select with Daytime, Nighttime, and Partly Cloudy conditions plus two plane choices
3D flight simulation with takeoff, guided navigation, and landing phases
Scoring on flight speed and landing smoothness based on runway alignment
Flight Logs history page with persisted past flights and score breakdowns
Flight School with controls reference and how-to-play walkthrough
